token_family_docs.$description: Lightness mode collection — user theme preference. Modes: light (the base — no class is applied), dark (.ob-lightness-dark). Each mode carries the CSS class string the application adds to <body> to activate it.

selector.$description: Light is the base lightness mode — no class is applied to <body>. It is the first-paint default; dark overrides it via .ob-lightness-dark.
Developer-facing class. The application adds it to <body> to activate the dark lightness mode, overriding the light base.
